_comment: DATA-core curated skill set. This is the source of truth for which skills ship with a fresh DATA install. bundle_skills.py reads this to copy skills from your live dirs INTO this bundle (maintainer side). install_skills.py reads this to copy the bundle OUT to the two discovery dirs on a fresh machine (install side). Edit the lists below to add/remove a skill, then re-run bundle_skills.py to refresh the physical files.
_note_clawdcursor: clawdcursor ships instruction-only: after bundle_skills.py runs, its heavy dist/ and native/ folders are pruned from the bundled copy (node_modules is already excluded by _IGNORE). The runtime binary is installed separately by the installer via 'npm install -g clawdcursor', and the .mcp.json.example registers it. If you re-run bundle_skills.py, re-prune dist/ and native/ from skills_bundle/claude/clawdcursor/.
